text: I feel curious, almost contemplative, immersed in a world of glass, light, and inquiry. The first scene, a corridor and meeting room, hums quietly with the promise of collaboration—still and prepared, yet void of presence. Moving to the second scene, I feel pulled into the vibrancy of ideas on display—the R+D wall, glowing with creative energy. Here, surrounded by exhibits and the hum of digital displays, I sense the pulse of innovation. I am both an observer and a participant, pondering how spaces like these shape human imagination and progress. There is a subtle excitement, a readiness to learn and be changed.
